steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0813.013913.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

steps.name: Click on 'Transactions' in the Header
Select '0813.013913 test request company' company using filter
Select '0813.013913 test request merchant' business unit using filter
Select currency USD
Click Currency Selector
Select currency USD from dropdown menu
Select Card type 'VISA' from dropdown menu
Click 'Amount' button
Fill 'From' amount value
Fill 'To' amount value
Click 'Apply' amount button
Verify: merchant ID is sent to the server
Verify: dateFrom is sent to the server
Verify: dateTo is sent to the server
Verify: currency is sent to the server
Verify: paymentMethod is sent to the server
Verify:amountFrom is sent to the server
Verify: amountTo is sent to the server
